## computePlan() function

Computes the set of operations to reconcile a project's file library with the desired local files.

Policy: aichatctl only manages files it has previously synced (tracked in [SyncState](./sdk.syncstate.md)<!-- -->). Files a user added manually in the web UI are never deleted — only tracked files that have dropped out of the manifest are.

Drift is detected via content hashes because the web UIs expose no way to read uploaded file content back.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function computePlan(input: PlanInput): SyncStep[];
```
